# WhatsApp Jobs

> WhatsApp Jobs is an Australia-wide service for finding construction, labour hire, tradie, hospitality, warehouse, and farm work through WhatsApp job groups. No extra app. Powered by Yakka.

WhatsApp Jobs helps workers in Australia find real shifts posted in WhatsApp groups they already use. Hirers with labour WhatsApp groups can use the service to reach workers when they are short-handed.

## Pages

- [Home](https://whatsappjobs.com.au/): Main landing page with how it works, FAQ, and WhatsApp contact
- [Sitemap](https://whatsappjobs.com.au/sitemap.xml): Index of public URLs on this site

## Get started

- [Find work on WhatsApp](https://wa.me/61416184624?text=Hi%2C%20I%27m%20looking%20for%20work.%20My%20trade%20is%20__%20and%20I%27m%20based%20in%20__): Message WhatsApp Jobs with your trade and location to join job groups near you
- [Hire through WhatsApp](https://wa.me/61416184624?text=Hi%2C%20I%20need%20to%20hire%20workers%20for%20my%20site): For builders and site managers with labour WhatsApp groups

## Contact

- [Website](https://whatsappjobs.com.au): whatsappjobs.com.au
- [Email](mailto:hello@whatsappjobs.com.au): hello@whatsappjobs.com.au
- [WhatsApp](https://wa.me/61416184624): +61 416 184 624

## Optional

- [Yakka labour hire app](https://yakkalabour.com.au/): Track hours on site and send invoices after a shift
- [LLM site summary](https://whatsappjobs.com.au/llms.txt): This file
